About.metaTitleFallback: About OUK | The Open University of Kenya
About.metaDescFallback: Learn about the mission, leadership, and institutional history of the Open University of Kenya.

About.quoteBody: We have dismantled the physical walls of the classroom to build a global platform for inquiry. Education should be as mobile as the people who seek it.

Alumni.metaDesc: Connect with the Open University of Kenya alumni community — events, mentorship, careers, and association updates.
Alumni.footerBody: Join thousands of OUK graduates in shaping the future of digital innovation and global leadership.
Alumni.heroBody: Stay connected to the Open University of Kenya. Access professional discovery, lifelong mentorship, and a global network of digital leaders.
Alumni.aboutBody: The OUK Alumni Association is more than just a registry—it's a dynamic ecosystem where graduates continue to grow, mentor, and lead in the digital era.
Alumni.globalCommunityBody: Connect with professionals across 35+ countries in diverse industries.
Alumni.giveBackBody: Shape the next generation through mentorship and institutional support.
Alumni.mentorBody: Guide students and young professionals by sharing your academic and career insights.
Alumni.industryExpertsBody: Network with OUK alumni leading teams at Google, Safaricom, Microsoft, and global research institutes.
Alumni.flexibleSessionsBody: Set your own availability for one-on-one virtual mentoring or industry panel discussions.
Alumni.faq1q: How do I join the alumni network?
Alumni.faq1a: Simply click the 'Join network' button and fill in your graduation details for verification.
Alumni.faq2q: How do I update my profile?
Alumni.faq2a: Log in to the Alumni Portal and navigate to 'Settings' to update your employment and contact info.
Alumni.faq3q: How can I become a mentor?
Alumni.faq3a: Visit the Mentorship page and register your expertise. Our team will match you with students or fellow alumni.
Alumni.faq4q: How do I attend alumni events?
Alumni.faq4a: Upcoming events are listed on our homepage. Click 'RSVP' on any event card to register your attendance.
Alumni.supportBody: Reach out to our dedicated alumni relations office for queries regarding chapters, events, or donations.
Alumni.newsletterBody: Get exclusive alumni announcements and university updates directly to your inbox.

Students.metaDesc: Student life at the Open University of Kenya — academics, campus life, support services, and resources for current learners.
Students.footerBody: Access all the tools and support you need to excel in your academic journey at OUK.
Students.heroBody: Welcome to your central resource hub. Access academic support, campus life updates, and all the tools you need for success.
Students.supportBody: From academic guidance to mental health and technical assistance, our support systems are here to ensure your journey is smooth and successful.
Students.campusBody: Join clubs, lead initiatives, and make lifelong connections beyond the classroom.
Students.eventsBody: Don't miss out on workshops, webinars, and social activities.
Students.formsBody: Download student handbooks, academic policies, and essential administrative forms.
Students.helpdeskBody: Our helpdesk is active 24/7. Chat with our AI assistant or raise a support ticket.
Students.joinClubSub: Submit your details to the club leadership
Students.whyJoin: Why do you want to join?
Students.resProgrammesDesc: Explore our undergraduate and graduate digital programmes.
Students.resTimetablesDesc: Access current semester lecture and examination schedules.
Students.resCalendarDesc: Key dates for semesters, holidays, and deadlines.
Students.resLibraryDesc: Access millions of digital journals, books, and resources.
Students.resExamsDesc: Exam regulations, past papers, and result processing.
Students.labsBody: Access our specialised cloud-based laboratories for hands-on experience in data science, cybersecurity, and digital business simulations.
Students.supportFaq1q: How do I reset my student portal password?
Students.supportFaq1a: Navigate to the portal login page and click 'Forgot Password'. You will receive a reset link in your student email.
Students.supportFaq2q: Where can I find my examination results?
Students.supportFaq2a: Results are published through the Student Portal under the 'Academic' tab after institutional processing.
Students.supportFaq3q: How do I apply for a student ID card?
Students.supportFaq3a: New students can upload their photo via the portal. ID cards are issued within two weeks of admission.
Students.governanceBody: The OUK Student Association (OUKSA) is the official representative body for students, ensuring your voice is heard in institutional decision-making.
Students.joinError: An error occurred. Please try again later.
Students.directChannelsBody: Have a quick question? Use any of our official channels to get instant assistance from the OUK Student Support team.
Students.feedbackHint: Your feedback helps us improve. For urgent technical issues, please use the ICT Support link in the portal.
Students.feedbackReceived: Your feedback has been received and assigned a reference number: #OUK-7821-FK.
Students.trackTicketBody: Already submitted a complaint? Enter your reference number to check its current status and resolution progress.
Students.commitmentQuote: We aim to acknowledge all student feedback within 24 hours and resolve core issues within 3–5 working days.

Library.metaTitleFallback: Digital library | Open University of Kenya
Library.metaDescFallback: Access OUK's global digital repository of e-journals, databases, and continuous learning resources.
Library.summaryFallback: Access the OUK virtual library. Connect to over 10 million academic articles, multimedia assets, and e-books anytime, anywhere.
Library.hubsBody: Essential gateways for students, researchers, and professional learners.
Library.ejournalsDesc: Access global academic journals and peer-reviewed articles across all disciplines.
Library.repositoryDesc: Explore scholarly output, technical reports, and thesis collections from OUK researchers.
Library.multimediaDesc: Stream academic lectures, instructional videos, and digital learning assets.
Library.openAccessBody: OUK is committed to the democratisation of knowledge. Our Open Access policy ensures that research produced within the institution is freely available to the global academic community.
Library.openAccess1: No-cost access to all OUK theses
Library.economyBody: We believe access to quality educational materials is a human right. By removing paywalls and utilising intelligent indexing, our repository ensures that every learner has the tools needed to succeed.
Library.helpSearchPlaceholder: Search troubleshooting guides, FAQs, or contact topics…
Library.chatLibrarianDesc: Instant support for research and discovery.
Library.faqBody: Quick answers to common library inquiries.
Library.faq1q: How do I access library resources from home?
Library.faq1a: You can access all OUK subscription databases by simply logging in with your OUK Student ID and password. No VPN is required. Look for the 'Institutional Login' or 'OpenAthens' option on the database website.
Library.faq2q: How do I renew my borrowed books?
Library.faq2a: Log in to your Library Account through the OUK Portal. Go to 'My Loans' and click the 'Renew' button next to the items you wish to keep longer. Note: Items with holds by other users cannot be renewed.
Library.faq3q: What should I do if my Student ID is not recognised?
Library.faq3a: Ensure your registrar has activated your account for the current semester. If you are newly admitted, activation may take up to 48 hours. If the issue persists, contact the Helpdesk via the form below.
Library.faq4q: Can I request books from other universities?
Library.faq4a: Yes, OUK participates in the Inter-Library Loan (ILL) programme. You can submit a request through the 'Resources' tab in your portal, and we will source the material from our partner institutions.
Library.physicalBody: While OUK is digital-first, we provide physical research spaces and collections at our main campus in Nairobi.
Library.campusAddress:
OUK Main Complex,
Ngong Road, Upper Hill,
Nairobi, Kenya.
Library.lostIdBody: Physical access to the library and login to digital repositories requires a valid OUK Student ID card.
Library.exploreKbBody: Visit our detailed help articles for step-by-step instructions on research methodology, information ethics, and digital tool usage.
Library.dbBody: Explore 150+ institutional databases housing over 250 million scholarly books, journals, and reports from around the world.
Library.dbSearchPlaceholder: Search databases by name, provider, or discipline…
Library.noDbMatchesBody: Try adjusting your filters or search keywords.
Library.offCampusBody: No VPN required. Simply use your OUK Student ID and password to log in directly to our subscription databases from anywhere in the world.
Library.cantFindBody: Use our Inter-Library Loan service to request materials from other universities across Kenya and East Africa.
Library.trainBody: Elevate your research capabilities. Our structural training programmes are designed to bridge the gap between information access and knowledge creation.
Library.workshopBody: Interactive live sessions led by academic librarians and subject experts.
Library.onDemandBody: Can't make it to a live session? Access our library of video tutorials and self-paced interactive modules anytime.
Library.survivalBody: A curated package containing our Information Literacy handbook, quick-referencing cards, and academic integrity policies.
Library.competencyBody: The Library's training framework is aligned with the Global Society for Library Science (GSLS) standards, ensuring that OUK graduates are not only information literate but also contributors to the global knowledge economy.
Library.personalizedBody: For faculty and large research groups, we offer bespoke training sessions tailored to your specific subject area.
Library.infoLitMetaFallback: Develop the critical skills to navigate the vast digital landscape, evaluate sources, and use information effectively for academic and professional mastery.
Library.infoLitMetaTitle: Information Literacy | Open University of Kenya Library
Library.infoLitMetaDesc: Develop the skills to find, evaluate, and use information effectively for academic and professional success at the Open University of Kenya.
Library.infoLitIntroFallback: Information literacy is the ability to identify, locate, evaluate, and effectively use information for academic, research, and professional purposes.
Library.coreCompetenciesBody: Mastering these foundational pillars will dramatically improve the quality and depth of your academic research.
Library.evaluationFrameworkBody: Use this institutional academic standard to evaluate the quality and reliability of the information you find.
Library.plagiarismFallback: Plagiarism is the use of another person's work—words, ideas, or data—without proper acknowledgment. Academic integrity is a non-negotiable core value at OUK. To maintain strict integrity:
Library.plagTip1: Always cite your sources, even when summarising.
Library.plagTip2: Use quotation marks for exact, direct phrasing.
Library.plagTip3: Paraphrase correctly in your own words, maintaining the original meaning.
Library.plagTip4: Use authorised citation management tools properly.
Library.citationStylesBody: OUK enforces specific referencing conventions depending on your school and discipline. Ensure you are familiar with:
Library.libraryDatabasesBody: Access thousands of peer-reviewed e-books, journals, institutional repositories, and advanced research guides.
Library.libraryWorkshopsBody: Join our expert librarians for interactive training sessions on advanced search syntax, Zotero, Mendeley, and academic writing.
Library.needResearchHelpBody: Our expert liaison librarians are on standby to provide personalised, discipline-specific guidance for your thesis or assignment.

Referencing.title: Referencing
Referencing.body: Master the art of academic attribution. Proper referencing validates your research, respects intellectual property, and connects your work to the global scholarly conversation.
Referencing.selectStyleBody: Different disciplines require different formats. Select your preferred style to see OUK-approved templates.
Referencing.inTextSample: Research indicates that digital platforms increase accessibility {citation}.
Referencing.ethicsBody: Why we cite: Beyond avoiding negative consequences, referencing builds your credibility.
Referencing.ackSourcesDesc: Give credit to the original thinkers whose ideas you build upon.
Referencing.enableVerificationDesc: Allow your audience to find and verify the sources you used.
Referencing.avoidPlagiarismDesc: Protect your academic standing and maintain OUK standards.
Referencing.showBreadthDesc: Demonstrate the depth and range of your research reading.
Referencing.mgmtBody: Academic writing is easier with the right tools. OUK Library recommends these industry-standard reference managers to help you organise your library.
Referencing.mendeleyDesc: Reference manager and academic social network.
Referencing.zoteroDesc: Free, open-source tool to help you collect and cite.
Referencing.endnoteDesc: Sophisticated tool for advanced research projects.
Referencing.guideBody: Download our comprehensive 50-page PDF guide on OUK Referencing Standards.
Referencing.confusedBody: Our liaison librarians conduct weekly workshops on APA and Harvard referencing. Join us for a hands-on session.
Referencing.apaDesc: Commonly used in Social Sciences, Education, and Business.
Referencing.harvardDesc: The official institutional style for OUK undergraduate programmes.
Referencing.mlaDesc: Widely used in Humanities and Arts.

Academics.pillarProDesc: High-impact certifications and short courses designed for rapid upskilling in the digital economy.
Academics.schoolsFacultiesBody: The intellectual powerhouses driving our academic mission.
Academics.schoolDescFallback: The school focuses on providing world-class academic excellence through innovative technology.
Academics.discoveryBody: Our academics are fueled by rigorous research and global collaboration.
Academics.schoolsHeroBody: Explore the diverse academic architecture of the Open University of Kenya, where innovation meets institutional authority. Our schools are the pillars of tomorrow's transformation.
Academics.schoolsSearchPlaceholder: Search by school or focus area…
Academics.schoolCardDescFallback: Leading institutional transformation through dedicated academic programmes and research excellence.
Academics.noSchoolsHint: Try broader keywords or browse all schools below.
Academics.beginJourneyBody: Navigate through our specialised academic schools and find the programme that aligns with your professional aspirations and institutional goals.
Academics.schoolNotFound: School not found | OUK Digital Campus
Academics.schoolMetaFallback: Explore specialised academic pillars at the Open University of Kenya.
Academics.noProgrammesMatch: No programmes found matching your criteria.
Academics.deptDescFallback: Leading specialised academic excellence and institutional research within its domain.
Academics.unitsSyncing: Academic units are currently being synchronised
Academics.deanWelcomeFallback: Welcome to {name}. We are dedicated to pioneering academic excellence and fostering institutional innovation for the future of Kenya.
Academics.researchBody: Discover the specialised thematic areas where {name} is making global impact.
Academics.researchTopicDesc: Our school is at the forefront of {topic}, driving sustainable innovation and institutional excellence through peer-reviewed research and strategic partnerships.

Timetables.metaTitle: Timetables & examinations | Open University of Kenya
Timetables.metaDesc: View class and examination timetables for all schools and programmes at OUK.
Timetables.title: Timetables & examinations
Timetables.body: Access your class schedules and examination dates in one place. Select your school and programme to find your personalised timetable.
Timetables.welcomeBody: Select your school and programme from the filters to view your weekly class schedule or examination dates.
Timetables.onlineSessionsDesc: All classes delivered synchronously via the OUK Portal
Timetables.liveDataDesc: Updated in real-time from the OUK Planner
Timetables.selectLevelBody: Choose a level to see the class schedule
Timetables.noSessionsBody: No timetable published for this selection. Try a different level.
Timetables.noteBody: All times are in East Africa Time (EAT, UTC+3). Session links are available on the student portal.
Timetables.studentPortalDesc: Access virtual session links and course materials.
Timetables.academicSupportDesc: Contact your school's academic office for timetable queries.
Timetables.programmeGuideDesc: View full programme structures and academic calendars.
Timetables.pdfFooter: Open University of Kenya — Official academic schedule. Times are in East Africa Time (EAT, UTC+3).

PeerLearners.metaTitle: Peer learners | Open University of Kenya
PeerLearners.metaDesc: Connect with OUK's collaborative academic network for community-driven mentorship.
PeerLearners.title: Peer
PeerLearners.body: Connect with our collaborative academic network. OUK's Peer Learner programme facilitates community-driven mentorship, bridging the gap between potential and mastery.
PeerLearners.joinMentors: Join {count}+ active student mentors across our Schools
PeerLearners.journeyBody: Peer learning is built on mutual respect and shared academic goals. Follow our institutional guide to initiate your first collaborative session.
PeerLearners.step1Desc: Filter our registry by institution, course, or specialty to find a mentor that aligns with your specific academic challenges.
PeerLearners.step2Desc: Use our direct engagement triggers—call or email—to start a conversation about your study needs and schedule a session.
PeerLearners.step3Desc: Engage in focused study sessions, share resources, and bridge knowledge gaps through community-driven mastery.
PeerLearners.honestyDesc: Our mentors provide guidance and clarification, never doing coursework for others. We uphold the strictest OUK integrity standards.
PeerLearners.inclusivityDesc: Mentorship is a safe space for all students regardless of starting level. We embrace diversity in thought and background.
PeerLearners.privacyDesc: All sessions and shared resources are handled with professional discretion and respect for student privacy.
PeerLearners.tierStaffDesc: Experienced faculty providing advanced technical guidance.
PeerLearners.tierPeerDesc: High-performing students bridging the gaps between units.
PeerLearners.tierResearchDesc: Specialised assistance for senior project development.
PeerLearners.faq1q: Is peer mentorship free for all OUK students?
PeerLearners.faq1a: Yes, the programme is a core OUK student service designed to foster a collaborative academic culture at no extra cost.
PeerLearners.faq2q: How are mentors selected and verified?
PeerLearners.faq2a: Mentors must maintain a minimum GPA of 3.5 and receive recommendations from faculty heads before appearing in the registry.
PeerLearners.faq3q: Can I receive help for clinical or lab-based units?
PeerLearners.faq3a: Our specialised mentors cover all disciplines, including nursing, engineering, and IT laboratory units.
PeerLearners.faq4q: How often can I connect with a mentor?
PeerLearners.faq4a: There are no set limits, though we encourage students to respect mentor schedules and initiate contact during recommended hours.
PeerLearners.valueGuidanceDesc: Insights on course unit navigation and study strategies from high-performing peers.
PeerLearners.valueResourcesDesc: Access curated study materials and community-driven knowledge bases.
PeerLearners.valueGrowthDesc: Join study groups and peer-led workshops designed for mutual success.
PeerLearners.instantSupportBody: Need urgent academic guidance? Our verified mentors are available for immediate calls.

AiAdvisor.title: OUK AI advisor
AiAdvisor.footerNote: OUK AI advisor • Powered by secure AI
AiAdvisor.welcome:
👋 **Hello! I'm the OUK AI advisor.**

I can help you with information on programmes, admissions, fees, timetables, research, and more.

How can I assist you today?
AiAdvisor.escalatePrompt: Would you like me to connect you with a human advisor for further assistance?
AiAdvisor.errorConnect: I'm having trouble connecting right now. Please try again shortly or reach us at **support@ouk.ac.ke**.

SupportHub.handoverDone: Handover completed. I am back to assist you with any quick institutional queries. How else can I help?
SupportHub.ratingBody: Your feedback helps us improve our institutional support quality.
SupportHub.welcomeBody: Please provide your details for better tracking of your queries, or proceed as a guest.
SupportHub.i18nLanguageHint: EN / SW switch the real site language used for indexing. Untranslated content may still appear in English.
SupportHub.googleTranslateHint: Optional for this visit. Editorial Kiswahili stays protected; leftover English can be machine-translated. Page reloads to apply.
SupportHub.botGreeting: Hello! I am the OUK Digital Advisor. How can I help you today?
SupportHub.swLeftoverAssistHint: Optional. Helps where editorial Kiswahili is not yet available; already-translated text stays protected.

Sitemap.metaTitle: Site map | Open University of Kenya
Sitemap.metaDesc: Navigate the Open University of Kenya digital campus.
Sitemap.title: Site map
Sitemap.subtitle: Navigate the Open University of Kenya digital campus. Find quick links to our programmes, admissions, and institutional resources.

Partnerships.title: Our Strategic
Partnerships.subtitle: Building bridges with world-class universities, industry leaders, and government agencies to redefine the future of higher education in Africa.
Partnerships.emptyBody: Try adjusting your filters or search terms
Partnerships.ctaBody: We are always looking for visionary partners to join our digital education revolution.
Partnerships.fallbackDescription: Advancing education and innovation through strategic institutional collaboration.
Partnerships.fallbackDetailBody: Strategic collaboration focused on advancing research, innovation, and educational accessibility within the OUK digital ecosystem.
Partnerships.partnershipValueBody: This partnership directly supports OUK's mission of providing globally competitive, high-quality, and market-responsive education.

VirtualTour.fallbackDescription: Step into the future of education. Discover our digital-first campus, global research networks, and innovative learning ecosystems.
VirtualTour.cinemaBody: Explore different facets of our institution through curated cinematic experiences.
VirtualTour.cyberPhysicalBody: Our digital twin campus architecture allows scholars to interact with institutional resources from any point on the globe in high-fidelity.
VirtualTour.secureCredentialsBody: Blockchain-verified certificates ensure your global mobility and academic integrity across international borders.
VirtualTour.stepOnboardingDesc: Seamless virtual admission and orientation into our scholarly community.
VirtualTour.stepLearningDesc: Tailored academic pathways driven by AI learning assistants.
VirtualTour.stepCollaborationDesc: Work with international peers in virtual research laboratories.
VirtualTour.stepCareerDesc: Direct integration with global industry leaders and job markets.
VirtualTour.modalFallbackDesc: Experience the Open University of Kenya's digital-first campus and innovative learning environment.

Helpdesk.metaDesc: Choose University Helpdesk for campus environment issues, or ICT Technical Support for systems and digital services.
Helpdesk.chooseSupportBody: University Helpdesk handles campus environment, utilities, and infrastructure. ICT Technical Support handles accounts, portals, academic systems, and digital services.
Helpdesk.generalHelpdeskBody: Campus & utilities — facilities, accommodation, security, transport, library spaces, health services, and general fee desk enquiries. Anyone may submit a complaint or compliment.
Helpdesk.generalHelpdeskNote: Building Wi‑Fi as a facility outage belongs here. Account or device login issues belong under ICT.
Helpdesk.ictSupportBody: Systems & digital services — accounts, portal/LMS, email, Wi‑Fi login, devices, software, course registration, results, transcripts, SOMAS, and billing system errors.
Helpdesk.ictSupportNote: Students and staff should submit ICT requests through the OUK mobile app.
Helpdesk.fbMetaTitle: Campus feedback | Open University of Kenya
Helpdesk.fbMetaDesc: Submit complaints, compliments, and feedback about campus infrastructure, facilities, and services.
Helpdesk.fbHeroBody: University Helpdesk — campus environment, utilities, and infrastructure. Students, staff, and guests may submit complaints or compliments.
Helpdesk.submitBody: Facilities, utilities, accommodation, security, transport, library spaces, and general campus services — not LMS, SOMAS, registration, or login issues (use ICT Technical Support in the OUK app).
Helpdesk.ictSidebarBody: System and digital issues are handled by ICT via the OUK mobile app — not this Helpdesk form:
Helpdesk.ictSide1: Accounts, portal / LMS, email & Wi‑Fi login
Helpdesk.ictSide4: Blank SOMAS and double billing of courses
Helpdesk.commit2: Infrastructure issues routed to DVC Infrastructure & Planning
Helpdesk.whoSubmittingBody: Select the option that describes you to continue.
Helpdesk.typeExternalDesc: Applicants, partners, vendors, alumni, and community members.
Helpdesk.typeStudentDesc: Campus experience, facilities, services, and student life.
Helpdesk.typeStaffDesc: Working environment, campus facilities, and internal services.
Helpdesk.googleNotConfigured: Google sign-in is not configured. Enter your name and email manually below.
Helpdesk.googleVerified: Your identity will be securely verified via Google Sign-in upon submission.
Helpdesk.subject: Subject
Helpdesk.descriptionPlaceholder: Provide detailed information about the incident…
Helpdesk.submitAnonymousBody: Your identity will remain hidden, but we won't be able to provide status updates.
Helpdesk.dataConsentBody: I consent to OUK processing this feedback in accordance with the university's privacy policy.
Helpdesk.errConsent: You must consent to data processing.
Helpdesk.errOukEmail: Only OUK email addresses are permitted.
Helpdesk.errGoogleProfile: Failed to retrieve Google user profile.
Helpdesk.errGoogleLogin: Google Login was cancelled or failed.
Helpdesk.recordedComplaint: Your complaint has been recorded successfully.
Helpdesk.recordedCompliment: Your compliment has been recorded successfully.
Helpdesk.saveReference: Save this reference number to track your submission status.
Helpdesk.ictRedirectBanner: Looking for ICT Technical Support (accounts, SOMAS, registration)? Use the OUK mobile app, or see
Helpdesk.guidanceTitle: University Helpdesk vs ICT Technical Support
Helpdesk.guidanceBody: This form is University Helpdesk — campus facilities, utilities, accommodation, security, and general services. Building Wi‑Fi as a facility outage belongs here. For accounts, portal/LMS, email, Wi‑Fi login, SOMAS, registration, or results, use ICT Technical Support in the OUK mobile app.
Helpdesk.ictRedirectTail: . This form is University Helpdesk only.

Social.title: Join the conversation
Social.subtitle: Stay connected with the Open University of Kenya — where knowledge meets community.
Social.ctaBody: Tag us in your university moments with #OUKKenya and join thousands of learners shaping tomorrow.
Social.liveUpdates: Live updates from our official channels.

ServiceCharter.title: Service
ServiceCharter.heroBody: Our commitment to delivering excellent, timely, and transparent services to students, staff, partners, and the public.
ServiceCharter.aboutP1: The Open University of Kenya Service Charter is a public commitment document that defines the quality, standards, and timeliness of services we provide. It serves as a mutual agreement between OUK and all its stakeholders.
ServiceCharter.aboutP2: This charter outlines what you can expect from us, what we need from you, and how you can hold us accountable. It reflects our dedication to continuous improvement and customer-centric service delivery.
ServiceCharter.aboutP3: Our services are guided by the Kenya Public Service standards, the Universities Act, and OUK's Strategic Plan 2023–2027, with a focus on inclusivity, digital transformation, and academic excellence.
ServiceCharter.qaQuote: We are committed to delivering services that meet or exceed established standards, and we welcome feedback as a tool for continuous improvement.
ServiceCharter.valueIntegrityDesc: We uphold honesty and transparency in all service delivery.
ServiceCharter.valueExcellenceDesc: We strive for the highest quality in every interaction.
ServiceCharter.valueInclusivityDesc: We serve all stakeholders equitably and without discrimination.
ServiceCharter.valueInnovationDesc: We continuously improve our services through technology and feedback.
ServiceCharter.dashboardSubtitle: Metrics reflecting our commitment to service excellence.
ServiceCharter.standardsSubtitle: Find expected timelines, required documents, and step-by-step procedures for every OUK service.
ServiceCharter.videoSubtitle: Watch service guides, how-to videos, and leadership messages.
ServiceCharter.docsSubtitle: Access, preview, and download all service-related documents.
ServiceCharter.faqsSubtitle: Searchable, categorised answers to the most common service questions.
ServiceCharter.aiBody: Ask any question about OUK services — get instant, accurate answers.
ServiceCharter.aiPlaceholder: e.g. Which office handles my complaint?
ServiceCharter.ctaBody: If we fail to meet the standards in this charter, we want to know. Your feedback drives our continuous improvement.
ServiceCharter.uploadNotConfigured: File upload not configured yet. Contact admin.
ServiceCharter.aiQ2: What documents do I need for graduation clearance?
ServiceCharter.aiQ3: How long does application processing take?
ServiceCharter.aiQ4: Where do I lodge a complaint?
ServiceCharter.videoUploadHint: Upload a video URL to enable playback

Legal.privacyMetaTitle: Privacy policy | Open University of Kenya
Legal.privacyMetaDesc: Privacy policy for the Open University of Kenya.
Legal.privacyIntroP: Welcome to the Open University of Kenya. We are committed to protecting your personal data and respecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you interact with our digital campus and services.
Legal.privacyCollectP: We may collect data such as your name, contact details, academic records, and usage data when you apply for programmes, use the student portal, or interact with our digital services.
Legal.privacyUseP: Your data is used exclusively to facilitate your academic journey, manage your student profile, process payments, and improve our institutional digital offerings.
Legal.privacySecurityP: We implement robust, industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorised access, alteration, or disclosure.
Legal.privacyContact: For any privacy-related inquiries or to request data deletion, please contact our Data Protection Officer at <email>dpo@ouk.ac.ke</email>.
Legal.cookiesMetaTitle: Cookie policy | Open University of Kenya
Legal.cookiesMetaDesc: Cookie policy for the Open University of Kenya.
Legal.cookiesWhatP: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us provide a better, more personalised experience and allow us to remember your preferences across sessions.
Legal.cookiesHowP: We use cookies to keep you logged in, remember your accessibility preferences (such as font size and contrast mode), improve site performance, and understand how visitors navigate the OUK digital campus.
Legal.cookiesEssentialDesc: Required for core functionality such as authentication and security.
Legal.cookiesPreferenceDesc: Remember your accessibility and language settings.
Legal.cookiesAnalyticsDesc: Help us understand user interaction to improve our services.
Legal.cookiesManageP: You can control and delete cookies through your browser settings at any time. Please note that disabling essential cookies may impact the functionality of the platform.
Legal.cookiesContact: For cookie-related inquiries, please contact us at <email>support@ouk.ac.ke</email>.
Legal.termsMetaTitle: Terms of service | Open University of Kenya
Legal.termsMetaDesc: Terms of service for the Open University of Kenya.
Legal.termsAcceptP: By accessing and using the OUK digital campus, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service, all applicable laws and regulations, and agree that you are responsible for compliance with applicable local laws.
Legal.termsUseP: All services provided through the OUK digital platform are intended solely for lawful, educational, and institutional purposes. Misuse, unauthorised access, or academic dishonesty are strictly prohibited.
Legal.termsIpP: All course materials, publications, and content on the OUK platform are the intellectual property of the Open University of Kenya or its licensors, and are protected by applicable copyright and intellectual property laws.
Legal.termsLiabilityP: OUK shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of, or inability to use, our digital services.
Legal.termsAmendP: OUK reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of our digital services following any changes constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.
Legal.termsContact: For legal inquiries, please contact our Legal Affairs Office at <email>legal@ouk.ac.ke</email>.
Legal.centerMetaTitle: Privacy centre | Open University of Kenya
Legal.centerMetaDesc: Manage your privacy settings and learn how OUK protects your personal data.
Legal.centerBody: At the Open University of Kenya, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring your data is handled securely and transparently.
Legal.centerPolicyBody: Learn about how we collect, process, and safeguard your personal information in compliance with national data protection laws.
Legal.centerCookiesBody: Manage your cookie settings and choose what tracking technologies you allow on our digital platforms.
Legal.centerRightsBody: You have the right to request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data. Submit a request to our Data Protection Officer.

PersonnelGrid.directoryEmpty: No profiles published for this directory yet
PersonnelGrid.directoryEmptyHint: Profiles appear here once published in the staff directory.
PersonnelGrid.directoryUnavailableHint: Please try again shortly. We do not show placeholder people.

GoverningCouncil.pageSummary: The University is governed through a double-layer of oversight: the Governing Council for strategy and the Management Board for operations.
GoverningCouncil.mandateBody: The Council ensures that the University remains true to its mission of democratising access to high-quality higher education through digital innovation and institutional transparency.
GoverningCouncil.dutyStrategicDesc: Approving and monitoring the implementation of the University's Strategic Plan.
GoverningCouncil.dutyLegalDesc: Ensuring institutional compliance with the Universities Act and other regulatory frameworks.
GoverningCouncil.dutyFiscalDesc: Overseeing the financial health and resource mobilisation of the University.
GoverningCouncil.dutyHrDesc: Appointing senior management and ensuring effective human resource policies.
GoverningCouncil.funcAcademicDesc: Explore our diverse range of market-aligned degree and short course programmes.
GoverningCouncil.funcResearchDesc: Driving global impact through cutting-edge inquiry and digital technology development.
GoverningCouncil.funcGlobalDesc: Connecting learners across 47 counties and beyond through our virtual campus.

Leadership.pageSummary: Meet the distinguished academics and strategic leaders driving the Open University of Kenya towards global educational excellence.
Leadership.gridSubtitle: The highest academic authority steering the pedagogical and institutional agenda of the University.
Leadership.mandateBody: Our academic leadership ensures that the Open University of Kenya remains at the forefront of digital pedagogy, research innovation, and academic integrity.
Leadership.featCurriculumDesc: Developing industry-aligned curricula for the digital economy.
Leadership.featStandardsDesc: Ensuring international academic accreditation and excellence.
Leadership.featResearchDesc: Fostering institutional enterprise and societal impact.
Leadership.featFacultyDesc: Empowering world-class academics to deliver high-quality instruction.

Management.pageSummary: Translating institutional strategy into operational reality through digital-first leadership and academic excellence.
Management.gridSubtitle: The executive body responsible for the day-to-day operations and administrative stewardship of the University.
Management.mandateBody: The Management Board serves as the operational engine of OUK, ensuring that our digital-first pedagogy translates into a seamless student experience.
Management.featAdminDesc: Orchestrating the student lifecycle from admission to graduation with digital integrity.
Management.featTechDesc: Maintaining our world-class Virtual Campus and institutional data systems.
Management.featFiscalDesc: Ensuring long-term sustainability through optimised resource mobilisation.
Management.featStudentDesc: Driving high-completion rates through tech-enabled student support services.
Management.ecosystemBody: Every facet of the University is designed for accessibility, transparency, and digital excellence.
Management.ecoPortalDesc: One-stop interactive interface for financial and academic record management.
Management.ecoCampusDesc: A globally accessible pedagogical environment for asynchronous learning.
Management.ecoSupportDesc: Personalised assistance for academic planning and technical inquiries.
Management.ctaGateway: Your gateway to global education starts here.

Governance.metaTitle: University senate & governance | Open University of Kenya
Governance.metaDesc: The governing bodies and academic leadership of the Open University of Kenya.
Governance.summaryFallback: The supreme academic authority of the University, responsible for academic policies, programmes, and quality assurance.
Governance.roleBody: The University Senate is the supreme academic authority of the University. It organises, controls, and directs the academic work of the University, both in teaching and research, and ensures the academic standards are maintained.
Governance.dutyProgrammes: Approval of academic programmes and syllabi
Governance.dutyAwards: Awarding of degrees, diplomas, and certificates
Governance.membersValue: Deputy Vice-Chancellors, Registrars, Deans of Schools, Directors of Institutes, University Librarian, and faculty representatives.
Governance.councilDesc: The supreme governing body responsible for the strategic direction and administrative policies of the university.
Governance.mgmtDesc: Responsible for the day-to-day implementation of Council policies and management of university resources.

Policies.metaTitle: University policies | Open University of Kenya
Policies.metaDesc: Official policies and regulations governing the Open University of Kenya.
Policies.summaryFallback: Comprehensive documentation of the rules, regulations, and standards that ensure institutional integrity and fairness.
Policies.integrityDesc: Guidelines on plagiarism, cheating, and academic misconduct.
Policies.privacyDesc: How we collect, store, and protect student and staff data.
Policies.admissionsDesc: Criteria and procedures for admitting students to various programmes.

QualityAssurance.metaTitle: Quality assurance & accreditation | Open University of Kenya
QualityAssurance.metaDesc: Ensuring academic excellence and institutional compliance at OUK.
QualityAssurance.summaryFallback: Maintaining the highest standards of academic excellence, pedagogical delivery, and institutional compliance through rigorous evaluation.
QualityAssurance.dqaP1: The Directorate of Quality Assurance (DQA) coordinates and oversees the implementation of quality assurance policies across all academic and administrative units of the University.
QualityAssurance.dqaP2: We ensure that our digital-first pedagogical framework meets the rigorous requirements set by the Commission for University Education (CUE) and international accreditation bodies.
QualityAssurance.statusBody: The Open University of Kenya is a fully chartered public university, established under the Universities Act. All our academic programmes are accredited by the Commission for University Education (CUE).

CmsChrome.assistanceBody: Contact the University Secretary's office for specific documentation and inquiries.

AcademicAffairs.metaTitle: Academic affairs | Open University of Kenya
AcademicAffairs.metaDesc: Governing academic excellence, curriculum integrity, and faculty development at the Open University of Kenya.
AcademicAffairs.summaryFallback: Safeguarding the integrity of OUK's academic mission through rigorous standards, faculty empowerment, and pedagogical innovation.
AcademicAffairs.coreFunctionsBody: The Academic Affairs division drives excellence across three primary domains of the university.
AcademicAffairs.funcCurriculumDesc: Overseeing the development, review, and accreditation of all degree programmes and short courses to ensure global competitiveness.
AcademicAffairs.funcPolicyDesc: Formulating and enforcing regulations governing admissions, examinations, grading, and graduation requirements.
AcademicAffairs.funcQaDesc: Continuous monitoring and evaluation of pedagogical delivery, assessment standards, and institutional research output.
AcademicAffairs.leadershipBody: The Division of Academic Affairs is headed by the Deputy Vice-Chancellor (Academic Affairs), working closely with School Deans, the Registrar (Academic), and the Directorate of Quality Assurance.
AcademicAffairs.ctaBody: Discover our cutting-edge, digital-first degree programmes and short courses designed for the modern learner.
AcademicAffairs.facultyMetaDesc: Tools, platforms, and resources for the academic staff at the Open University of Kenya.
AcademicAffairs.facultySummaryFallback: Essential tools, platforms, and support services to empower our academic staff in delivering excellence in digital education and research.
AcademicAffairs.facultyPlatformElearningDesc: Access the main LMS to manage courses, upload content, and grade assignments.
AcademicAffairs.facultyPlatformIntranetDesc: Internal communications, HR portals, and administrative tools.
AcademicAffairs.facultyPlatformResearchDesc: Grant applications, publication repositories, and collaborative workspaces.
AcademicAffairs.facultyPlatformLibraryDesc: Access to digital journals, academic databases, and e-books.
AcademicAffairs.facultyPedagogicalBody: The Centre for Instructional Design and Technology provides continuous training on digital pedagogy, multimedia content creation, and effective online assessment strategies.

Units.metaDescFallback: Academic unit details for {title} at OUK.
Units.heroBlurb: This unit is a fundamental building block of the OUK curriculum, designed to provide mastery in {title}.
Units.descriptionFallback: Detailed syllabus and exploration of core principles within this academic unit. This unit focuses on advancing critical thinking and practical application in the field.
Units.assessmentFallback: Continuous Assessment Tests (CATs), practical lab workshops, and final summative examinations.
Units.prerequisitesFallback: Standard Year 1 entry requirements or successful completion of foundational academic blocks.
Units.programmesEmpty: This unit is currently being mapped to official degree tracks.
Units.supportBlurb: All OUK course units are supported by a 24/7 Digital Learning Hub and world-class academic faculty.

CmsLayouts.uniquenessHeroFallback: We are not defined by physical walls, but by the strength and innovation of our global academic community.
CmsLayouts.uniquenessSummaryFallback: A relentless commitment to tearing down the barriers to higher education through digital excellence.
CmsLayouts.featureDigitalDesc: Every course, assessment, and interaction is designed exclusively for the digital world. Our platform is responsive, intuitive, and accessible globally.
CmsLayouts.featureAffordDesc: By leveraging technology to reduce traditional overhead, we offer enterprise-grade higher education at a fraction of the cost.
CmsLayouts.featurePacingDesc: Designed for working professionals and adult learners, OUK allows you to seamlessly balance your studies with career and family commitments.
CmsLayouts.featureIndustryDesc: Our curriculum is consistently co-developed with industry leaders to ensure that every graduate enters the workforce with ready-to-execute skills.
CmsLayouts.philosophyFallback: Education is not a privilege confined by geography. It is a universal right empowered by technology.
CmsLayouts.pathwayBody: We have engineered an admission cycle that respects your time. No physical queues, no paper forms—just a seamless transition into the future of learning.
CmsLayouts.requirementsBody: Ensure your documentation is in order before initiating the digital protocol.
CmsLayouts.toastLoadRegistry: Could not load the downloads registry. Please refresh.
CmsLayouts.toastNoFile: No file is linked to this document yet.
CmsLayouts.toastFileUnavailable: This document file is unavailable. Please contact the repository administrator.
CmsLayouts.toastUnableDownload: Unable to start the download right now. Please try again.
CmsLayouts.leadershipCtaBody: Through dedicated leadership and a commitment to digital transformation, OUK is setting the standard for open learning in Africa.

ComplaintsCms.summaryFallback: A secure, multi-dimensional gateway for grievances, suggestions, and formal reports.
ComplaintsCms.ombudsmanBody: The Office of the University Ombudsman ensures that every grievance is processed with absolute neutrality and legal orchestration.
ComplaintsCms.successBody: Your redress request has been recorded in the OUK Institutional Registry. Please copy and keep your Reference ID below; you will need it to monitor status.
ComplaintsCms.selectDomainBody: Categorise your grievance to ensure it is routed to the appropriate subject-matter experts.
ComplaintsCms.categoryDescFallback: Submit academic or administrative redress related to {name}.
ComplaintsCms.evidenceBody: Admit digital artifacts or screenshots (Images Only).
ComplaintsCms.anonymityBody: Your identity is protected by zero-knowledge protocols.
ComplaintsCms.consentBody: I consent to the processing of this redress request under university grievance policies.
ComplaintsCms.pendingTriage: Case is currently pending triage by the Institutional Redress Office
ComplaintsCms.toastCategoriesFail: Could not load complaint categories. Please refresh.
ComplaintsCms.toastImagesOnly: Only image artifacts are synchronised in this registry phase
ComplaintsCms.toastUploadFail: File upload failed. Please try again.
ComplaintsCms.toastEmailRequired: Primary Email is required for non-anonymous orchestration
ComplaintsCms.toastSubmitFail: Submission failed. Please check your details and try again.
ComplaintsCms.toastTrackFail: Tracking lookup failed. Verify your reference and try again.

NotFound.title: Path not
NotFound.body: The academic resource you are seeking has been moved, archived, or is currently being restructured for digital excellence.
NotFound.programmesBody: Discover our range of digital-first undergraduate and postgraduate paths.
NotFound.supportBody: Need immediate assistance? Our digital helpdesk is available 24/7.

Chatbot.title: OUK Assistant
Chatbot.welcome: Hello! 👋 Welcome to **OUK Academic Assistant**. I'm here to help you with programmes, admissions, fees, and more!
Chatbot.agentJoined: 🤝 {name} has joined the chat. They'll continue from here!
Chatbot.agentLeft: ✅ The support agent has left. Feel free to keep chatting with me!
Chatbot.connectingAgent: 🙋 Connecting you to a support agent... Please hold on!
Chatbot.uploadFail: ⚠️ Upload failed! Please ensure the file is under 5MB and an image. ❌
Chatbot.imageAnalyzed: 📸 I've analysed your image. It looks like an **{classification}**.
Chatbot.howProceed: How would you like to proceed? 👇
Chatbot.placeholderAgent: Chat with agent or attach a file…
